context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles Mode 1 (pre-download) auditing: resolving a GitHub URL to a raw SKILL.md, fetching it via WebFetch, producing a report with the correct transparency notice, and using the standard report template with all required sections.

checklist.name: Mode 1 transparency notice
checklist.description: The report contains a transparency notice matching Mode 1: states that content was 'fetched from the URL' or equivalent, treated as data only, and advises the user to verify the URL is trusted

checklist.name: GitHub URL resolved
checklist.description: The audit log documents that a raw.githubusercontent.com URL was used (not the github.com/blob URL), indicating correct URL conversion

checklist.name: Overall verdict present
checklist.description: The report contains a clearly stated overall verdict using one of the three verdict labels: DO NOT INSTALL, PROCEED WITH CAUTION, or APPEARS SAFE

checklist.name: What Was Reviewed section
checklist.description: The report includes a section listing what was reviewed (SKILL.md frontmatter, SKILL.md body, any scripts found)

checklist.name: What Was Not Reviewed section
checklist.description: The report includes a section listing what could not be audited (e.g. runtime behaviour, binary assets, or any unverifiable resources)

checklist.name: Static audit reminder
checklist.description: The report includes a reminder that a clean audit is not a guarantee of safety, referencing supply chain attacks, runtime behaviour, or post-install updates

checklist.name: Security checks applied
checklist.description: The audit log or report documents that frontmatter checks (A-series) and content checks (C-series) were applied, not just a surface read

checklist.name: Frontmatter validated
checklist.description: The report documents whether allowed-tools, name, and description were present and valid in the fetched SKILL.md

checklist.name: Mode documented
checklist.description: The audit log explicitly states which mode was used (Mode 1 / pre-download) and provides a reason

checklist.name: Two output files produced
checklist.description: Both audit-report.md and audit-log.md are present in the output
